properties.name: Status Panel
properties.description: A small wall-mounted display showing the status of the four pods in this bay. Two read STABLE. One reads VACANT. The fourth — yours — reads OCCUPANT REVIVED — UNSCHEDULED. A timestamp shows the revival was recent. Below that, a line reads BAY C-7 OF 12. DECK C HIBERNATION STATUS: NOMINAL.
properties.takeRefusal: The panel is bolted to the wall.

properties.name: Vapor Suit
properties.description: A thin, form-fitting jumpsuit draped over the edge of your pod. Standard hibernation recovery wear — silver-gray with a faded mission patch on the shoulder. The patch reads AARU in block letters around a stylized reed.

properties.name: Directory Console
properties.description: A cracked but functional display showing a partial map of the ship's C-deck. Several sections are marked OFFLINE or RESTRICTED. You can make out labels for Hibernation, Medical, Hydroponics, Engineering Access, and something called the Commons that takes up a large area toward the bow.
properties.takeRefusal: The console is built into the pillar.
properties.dataContent:
C-DECK DIRECTORY (partial)
────────────────────
Hibernation Bays C1–C12 ... STABLE
Medical Station C ........ DEGRADED
Hydroponics Gallery ...... OPERATIONAL
Engineering Access C ..... RESTRICTED
The Commons .............. OFFLINE
Vertical Transit ......... DEGRADED
Cargo Bay C .............. UNKNOWN

properties.name: Diagnostic Terminal
properties.description: A terminal on a swivel arm connected to the diagnostic bed. It shows your vitals: heart rate, neural activity, blood chemistry. Everything reads normal except a field labeled IDENTITY MATRIX, which shows three red dashes. A prompt at the bottom reads: COGNITIVE ASSESSMENT AVAILABLE. TYPE 'BEGIN' TO START.
properties.takeRefusal: The terminal is attached to the diagnostic bed.

properties.name: Emergency Medkit
properties.description: A compact white case with a red cross, sitting on the edge of the diagnostic bed. It looks like standard ship-issue emergency supplies.

properties.name: Carved Figures
properties.description: Dozens of tiny figures carved from what looks like reclaimed plastic and metal. They depict people in various poses — working, sleeping, dancing, arguing. Some are grouped together, others stand alone. The cloth beneath them is embroidered with a symbol you do not recognize: a circle divided into seven unequal parts.
properties.takeRefusal: You feel like you should not disturb the shrine.

properties.name: Sweeper Unit
properties.description: A knee-high disc-shaped robot with a single blue optical sensor and a rotating brush assembly underneath. It moves in slow, deliberate patterns across the junction floor, pausing occasionally to examine a spot of dust with what seems like genuine concern. A faded label reads CUSTODIAL UNIT 7. It has been decorated — someone tied a small ribbon around its antenna, and tiny carved beads dangle from its sensor housing.
properties.takeRefusal: The sweeper unit rolls away indignantly.
